# Christina's Child Care Center: Licensed Family Child Care in Crystal, Minnesota

> Licensed family child care serving infants through school-age children in Crystal, MN since 2020. Owner-operated by Christina with 20+ years of childcare experience. Low staff-to-child ratios, play-based curriculum, free transportation for enrolled families, and daily parent communication through a secure portal. Background-checked, CPR-certified staff. Minnesota DHS Licensed.

## Programs and tuition

- Infant Care (6 weeks to 12 months): 1:4 staff-to-child ratio, $375/week. Individualized care plans, tummy time, sensory exploration, daily photo updates.
- Toddler Program (1 to 3 years): 1:5 ratio, $325/week. Language development, social skills, outdoor play, art and music activities.
- Preschool (3 to 5 years): 1:8 ratio, $285/week. Kindergarten readiness, early literacy, math concepts, creative expression.
- School Age (5 to 12 years): 1:12 ratio, $185/week. Before and after school care, homework support, enrichment activities, summer programming.

Sibling discounts available. County childcare assistance accepted (Hennepin County).

## Location and hours

5510 W Broadway Ave, Crystal, MN 55428
Monday through Friday, 6:30 AM to 6:00 PM
Phone: (763) 555-0123

## What makes this program different

- Free transportation for enrolled families (a differentiator most centers do not offer)
- Staff-to-child ratios lower than Minnesota state requirements
- Daily photo sharing through a secure parent portal
- Owner on-site every day (not a franchise or corporate chain)
- 20+ years of combined childcare experience
- Background-checked and CPR-certified staff
- CACFP participant (USDA Child and Adult Care Food Program): nutritious meals and snacks included
- Play-based curriculum aligned to Minnesota Early Learning Standards

## Enrollment

Tour scheduling and enrollment inquiries accepted online at christinas-childcare.vercel.app/enroll or by phone. Typical enrollment process: inquiry, scheduled tour, enrollment paperwork, start date coordination. Waitlist maintained when programs are at capacity.

## Licensing and compliance

Minnesota Department of Human Services licensed family child care provider. Annual inspections. All staff complete required training hours. Incident reporting and safety protocols follow state childcare licensing standards.

## Technology

Parent portal with secure login for viewing daily photos, newsletters, messages, and child progress. Employee portal for staff scheduling, meal counts, and training. Administrative tools for attendance, billing, compliance tracking, and reporting.

## Web property

https://christinas-childcare.vercel.app
